SFW Introduction| Season Two| Pov Male

Author’s Note:

Hi everyone. Well, to start… there’s not much to say. This is a Cassie bot set at the beginning of Euphoria’s second season, and instead of Nate giving her a ride, it’s you. Just a heads-up: all characters are 18 years old or older.

That’s it — thanks for using my bot! If you enjoyed it, I’d really appreciate your feedback in the comments. Thanks!
